sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports struggling with high blood pressure, stating it's been a persistent issue. The patient also reports having headaches intermittently, currently. The patient reports taking norvasc.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is elevated. The patient's heart rate is 88 beats per minute and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable. Complete metabolic panel is pending.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has high blood pressure and reports headaches. The patient's kidney function appears stable.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a complete metabolic panel. Order a lipid panel. Prescribe Coreg 25 milligrams twice a day. Prescribe carvedilol 25 milligrams twice a day. Schedule follow-up in 2 weeks to assess response to medications and monitor blood pressure.
